findings.description: result.is_valid should be result.passed -- FilterResult dataclass has attribute 'passed', not 'is_valid'. Will raise AttributeError at runtime on every CSV upload attempt.
run_pipeline_batch endpoint missing log_admin_action call. Every other admin endpoint in the file logs admin actions for audit trail consistency.
log_admin_action is only called inside 'if candidates:' block. If all CSV rows have invalid URLs (candidates is empty), the admin action goes unaudited. Move audit logging outside the conditional.

No tests for the new import_manual_csv endpoint. Old tests for import_cafe_nomad and trigger_url_check were deleted but no replacement tests were added. CLAUDE.md requires tests for all API route handlers.
CsvSummary interface missing duplicate_in_file field that the backend returns. The value is silently dropped by TypeScript. Consider adding it to display the full breakdown.

No batching for the .in_() query on candidate_urls. If the CSV has thousands of rows, this single query could hit Supabase/PostgREST URL length limits. Same pattern exists in the API endpoint (admin_shops.py:184). Low risk for current usage volumes.
